## Change boundary

- Edition or Core Engine surface changed:
- Explicit owner authority for edition behaviour changes:

## Edition impact assessment

- [ ] No other edition's layout, prompts, workflow, UI, data sources, branding, navigation, buttons, categories, analytics or business logic changes.
- [ ] Existing Music editions remain unchanged.
- [ ] Existing Cars editions remain unchanged.
- [ ] Existing Clubs editions remain unchanged.
- [ ] New edition-specific behaviour is isolated in its own contract or module.
- [ ] Shared changes are genuinely reusable Core Engine services.

## Verification

- [ ] Full validation suite passed.
- [ ] Edition-isolation test passed.
- [ ] Existing production outputs remain backward compatible.

If any preservation checkbox cannot be selected, stop and obtain explicit owner authority before merging.
